MISCELLANEOUS ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-26-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Order to Show Cause to Plaintiff's Counsel for failure to comply with San Francisco Superior Court Early Settlement Program Policies and Procedures No. 4. (Administrative fee) is ordered off calendar/fee paid. Proceedings reported by: Maureen Howard, CSR#7156. (212)

Notice Of Mtoion And Motion For Order Compelling Production Of Documents And For Sanctions Against Pltf Brian Ha
Off Calendar Apr-02-2007 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearance:
Leo M. LaRocca, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff/moving party D.D.P.M., Inc.
No other appearance.

Ruling:
Hearing held. Tentative Ruling adopted with modifications. Defendants D.P.P.M., Inc.'s and Chris Sprague's Motion To Compel Production Of Documents is granted. No opposition has been filed. Plaintiff's failure to respond was a misuse of the discovery process. Sanctions are awarded against Plaintiff Brian Ha in the amount of $410, to be paid within 30 days of notice of this order.
MODIFICATIONS:
Tentative modified to compel responses within 15 days of notice of order. Order signed in open court. COMM: EVERETT A. HEWLETT

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Feb-27-2007 Set For Trial On Sep-04-07 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206; Settlement Conference On Aug-17-07 At 03:30 P.M. In Dept 613

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jan-17-2007 Continued To Mar-09-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 212
